title: DevForge Decision Log Entry
description: Append-only architectural decision record. One entry per merge. The approve action is unavailable until explicit_question_answer is populated.

commit_hash.description: Git commit hash tagged with this RunID. Null if rejected.

risk_score.description: Computed risk score from risk formula.

risk_tier.description: Derived from risk_score: <=3 low, 4-7 medium, 8-11 high, >=12 critical.

files_modified.description: List of files in the staged diff.

explicit_question.description: Generated question based on risk tier. Must be answered before approval.

explicit_question_answer.description: Human's written answer. Approve action locked until this is populated.

present.description: Were unplanned patterns flagged in the change report?

disposition.description: Written disposition if present=true. 'N/A' if present=false.

performance_delta_acknowledgment.description: Required if gate_3_tick_delta_percent is non-zero. Written acknowledgment of performance change.

model_version.description: AI model version used (if any). Null for pure human commits.

scope_lock_ref.description: Reference to scope lock document (if coder model was used).
